description: Alerting rules for the GCP Data Exfiltration Chain scenario (DLP, VPC Flow, GCS)

rules.name: [CloudLoadGen] GCP Data Exfil Chain — DLP Finding Alert
rules.investigationGuide:
# Security Command Center (SCC) Exfiltration Finding

Security Command Center flagged an exfiltration-class finding — highest-fidelity signal.

## Triage
1. Identify principal: `FROM logs-gcp.scc-* | WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 1h AND gcp.scc.finding_class LIKE "*EXFILTRATION*" | KEEP @timestamp, gcp.scc.finding_class, gcp.scc.severity, source.ip, destination.ip | SORT @timestamp DESC`
2. Check if principal still has active sessions
3. Rotate credentials immediately if confirmed

## Escalate when
- Always page security on-call for EXFILTRATION-class findings
- Principal has access to customer-data buckets

rules.name: [CloudLoadGen] GCP Data Exfil Chain — VPC High Bytes Sent
rules.investigationGuide:
# VPC Flow High Egress Bytes

A single flow shipped >50 MiB outbound.

## Triage
1. Top sources: `FROM logs-gcp.vpcflow-* | WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 1h AND network.direction == "egress" AND gcp.vpcflow.bytes > 52428800 | STATS bytes = SUM(gcp.vpcflow.bytes) BY source.ip | SORT bytes DESC | LIMIT 25`
2. Check destination geo — foreign IPs are higher signal
3. Cross-reference with Security Command Center (SCC) rule

## Escalate when
- Same source IP triggering repeatedly
- Destination on egress-deny list

rules.name: [CloudLoadGen] GCP Data Exfil Chain — Large GCS Object Get
relatedDashboards: GCP Cloud Audit Logs — API Activity
rules.investigationGuide:
# GCS storage.objects.get With High Response Volume

A principal pulled objects at unusually high volume (many items in one audit response).

## Triage
1. Identify who and what: `FROM logs-gcp.audit-* | WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 1h AND event.action == "storage.objects.get" AND gcp.audit.num_response_items > 100 | KEEP @timestamp, user.name, source.ip, user_agent.original, gcp.audit.resource_name | SORT gcp.audit.num_response_items DESC`
2. Is the bucket sensitive (PII, secrets, backups)?
3. Console or programmatic? Check user_agent

## Escalate when
- Bucket contains customer data or secrets
- Principal is a service account reading at unusual volume

rules.name: [CloudLoadGen] GCP Data Exfil Chain — Full Chain Correlation
rules.investigationGuide:
# Full Chain Correlation — Data Exfiltration

**Treat as confirmed incident until proven otherwise.** Multiple exfiltration signals co-occurred.

## Triage
1. Page on-call security lead immediately
2. Correlate: `FROM logs-gcp.scc-*, logs-gcp.vpcflow-*, logs-gcp.audit-* | WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 30m | WHERE (event.dataset == "gcp.scc" AND gcp.scc.finding_class LIKE "*EXFILTRATION*") OR (event.dataset == "gcp.vpcflow" AND network.direction == "egress" AND gcp.vpcflow.bytes > 52428800) OR (event.dataset == "gcp.audit" AND event.action == "storage.objects.get" AND gcp.audit.num_response_items > 100) | KEEP @timestamp, event.dataset, user.name, source.ip | SORT @timestamp ASC`
3. Contain: rotate credentials, block destination IP

## Escalate when
- **Always.** This is the page-the-CISO bar.
